title: Themadhood's Rates Database
subtitle: Google Sheets rate database for pricing, estimates, and quote data.
description: Themadhood's Rates DB is a Google Sheets based database used to store rate, pricing, estimate, and quote information in one central place.
A connected Google app is used to manage the database, while other applications and automations can read the sheet data when they need current rate information.
features: Central Google Sheets database for rate and pricing records
Google app management layer for easier updates and maintenance
Readable data source for other applications, scripts, and automations
Keeps estimate logic separated from the apps that consume the data
statusDetails: Database structure is being organized for project use
Google Sheets is the main storage layer
Google app management tools are part of the workflow
Application and automation integrations may expand over time

screenshots.title: Rates Sheet
screenshots.body: Google Sheets database view for rate and pricing records

screenshots.title: Management App
screenshots.body: Google app used to manage and update rate data

howItWorks: Rate and pricing records are stored in Google Sheets.
The Google app provides the management interface for editing and maintaining the database.
Other applications and automations read the sheet data when they need current rates or estimate values.
setupInstall: Create or connect the Google Sheet used as the rate database.
Connect the management Google app to the sheet.
Give approved applications or automations read access to the sheet data.
apiStructure: Consumer layer: applications and automations that read the database for rate data.

progressNotes: Core schema and record system implementation
